title: 6 Pieces Silicone Spatula Set Mini Thin Jar Scraper Small Rubber Spatula for Makeup Beauty Products Tiny Spatulas Lotion Stirrer Kitchen Bottles Cosmetic Bottles (Red + Black)
description:
About this item
【Premium Material】Our mini spatulas are made of food frade silicone material, safe and non-toxic, flexible, durable and reusable. They are easy to clean, dishwasher safe or you can clean them by hand. Put it at home for daily use or take it with you when you travel and use it when you need it, bringing convenience to your life
【Elaborate Design】Our silicone spatula adopts a double headed design, one side is a spoon and the other is a scraper. The long enough body and the narrow head with proper flexibility make spatula reach the bend and corner of the bottle easily, reach deeply into the bottle without wasting any cosmetics
【Wide Application】Our rubber spatulas are widely used in many aspects, they can not only be applied for cosmetics, such as lotion, cream, sleeping mask, essence, foundation solution, lip gloss, mud mask, body lotion, lip glos, but also be applied for various jams, such as peanut butter, ketchup, mushroom sauce, honey, and so on
【Package Includes】Each package comes with 6 pcs silicone spatulas in 2 kinds of different colors (black + red), 3 different sizes, large size is 12 x 0.6 inches, medium size is 9.2 x 0.45 inches, mini size is 6.1 x 0.3 inches, meet your various needs. A practical tool you deserve
【Buy with Confidence】Yuntop is committed to providing customers with quality products and caring services. If you have any questions during the use of our products, please tell us by email. If you are not satisfied with our products, we promise 100% refund. Customers' satisfaction is our greatest pursuit
reviews_5s: I was expecting much smaller than they were. That’s my fault though but some are the size I was hoping and some much larger which will come in handy for other things. And the handles are metal, was not expecting that either. I don’t know if those are in the description. I didn’t investigate though I should’ve. Great quality as well. Heavy duty metal. Silicon is flexible but also firm. Colors are just red and black. Going to be easy to clean. Definitely recommend.I bought these to get the last of my lotion out of my squeeze bottles. It’s amazing how much product is left inside without you knowing until you cut it open. I can get almost a week worth of use by scraping it out with these spatulas. These are very handy!Recently bought some new skincare and got some free samples (pictured) that I absolutely adore. Unfortunately, the products are very expensive so naturally I want to stretch the sample as long as I can and thankfully with this brand a little goes a long way. With the smallest tool I was able to get small dabs to use on my face and I still have so much products left. I absolutely love these and how versatile they are. Can’t wait to use the other sizes for hair care products and in the kitchen.The product is sturdy. They are a bit too large and long for my needs but they can be considered good quality. I like the back and red combo because I have planned on using this for my skincare products and experiments.I have played with these bottles when they first came out. They are helpful when you are low on foundations in bottles. I mainly use for liquids which are in a bottle. It is geat to use to scrape out the liquids in the bottle
reviews_1s: Bought these to use to get extra make up out of jar. The ends are very flimsy and makes it very hard to get stuff out. Wish the ends were more firm. I may try to use them for something else.No me grado porque lo utilice para los frascos de crema facial y la cucharita es muy débil.These are two flimsy to do anything with.
